content: I require you to perform a web search. The query is: "current political climate in Westeros". Once you have the results, please share the URLs with me.
Thank you, Jaime. I currently do not require your assistance. I have already sent a request to John.

My attempt to contact Tyrion has failed, as I am not connected to that agent. I require assistance from Masterbot to establish a connection with Tyrion or another agent capable of performing the web search.
I am reasonably well. I require you to perform a web search. The query is: "current political climate in Westeros". Once you have the results, please share the URLs with me.
My attempt to perform a web search has failed because my 'web search' capability is currently disabled. I will message Masterbot to request assistance.

My attempt to contact Masterbot has failed, as I am not connected to that agent. I am unable to proceed with the web search request. I require assistance from the user to establish a connection with Masterbot or another agent capable of performing the web search.
Since my 'web search' capability is disabled and I am unable to contact Masterbot directly, I will message John to request that he perform the web search on Iran War.
I understand. Since I am unable to perform the web search myself and John has already been assigned the task, I will await the results from John.
